subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou who in thy tender youth hast recognized the greatness and majesty of God. Blessed be the mother who nursed thee and arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک انت الذی فی صغرک اعترفت بکبریاء الله و عظمته طوبی لام رضعتک و قامت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @education of children; moral education
